headline: Analog Devices Eyes $1.5 Billion Empower Deal
summary: Analog Devices is in advanced talks to buy Empower Semiconductor in cash, with a deal possible as soon as Tuesday.

headline: Analog Devices closes in on $1.5 billion Empower Semiconductor acquisition – Bloomberg (ADI)
summary: Analog Devices reportedly in advanced negotiations for cash takeoverAnalog Devices (NASDAQ:ADI) is reportedly nearing an agreement to acquire privately owned chipmaker Empower Semiconductor in a deal valued at approximately $1. 5 billion in cash, according to a Bloomberg News report published Tuesday citing sources familiar with the matter.

content.title: Analog Devices closes in on $1.5 billion Empower Semiconductor acquisition – Bloomberg (ADI)
content.summary: Analog Devices reportedly in advanced negotiations for cash takeoverAnalog Devices (NASDAQ:ADI) is reportedly nearing an agreement to acquire privately owned chipmaker Empower Semiconductor in a deal valued at approximately $1. 5 billion in cash, according to a Bloomberg News report published Tuesday citing sources familiar with the matter.

headline: Analog Devices to Acquire Empower Semiconductor, Expanding its Next-Generation High-Density Power Portfolio for the AI Era
summary: Analog Devices, Inc. (NASDAQ: ADI) and Empower Semiconductor today announced that they have entered into a definitive agreement under which ADI will acquire Empower in an all-cash transaction for $1.5 billion.

content.title: Analog Devices to Acquire Empower Semiconductor, Expanding its Next-Generation High-Density Power Portfolio for the AI Era
content.summary: Analog Devices, Inc. (NASDAQ: ADI) and Empower Semiconductor today announced that they have entered into a definitive agreement under which ADI will acquire Empower in an all-cash transaction for $1.5 billion.

headline: Analog Devices to buy Empower Semiconductor for $1.5 billion to boost AI power portfolio
summary: U.S. chipmaker Analog Devices said on Tuesday it would ‌acquire Empower Semiconductor for about $1.5 billion ‌in cash, expanding its AI-focused power management portfolio.  The companies ​said the deal will help advance power delivery for AI and other compute-intensive applications, for which power bottlenecks can be ‌limiting.  • Empower CEO Tim Phillips said the company was founded to ⁠solve "the hardest problem in AI power delivery," which is the power bottleneck that ​curbs AI ​throughput.

content.title: Analog Devices to buy Empower Semiconductor for $1.5 billion to boost AI power portfolio
content.summary: U.S. chipmaker Analog Devices said on Tuesday it would ‌acquire Empower Semiconductor for about $1.5 billion ‌in cash, expanding its AI-focused power management portfolio.  The companies ​said the deal will help advance power delivery for AI and other compute-intensive applications, for which power bottlenecks can be ‌limiting.  • Empower CEO Tim Phillips said the company was founded to ⁠solve "the hardest problem in AI power delivery," which is the power bottleneck that ​curbs AI ​throughput.
